response.justification: Candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the resume shows no meaningful work in Java, Kotlin, Spring, or IDE/language tooling at the depth this role requires. Primary stacks are Node.js/TypeScript and DLang, with Java mentioned only in passing on robotics/orchestration projects years ago. The brief C/C++ stint on NI LabWindows/CVI is the closest IDE-internals exposure, but it predates a decade of unrelated work and does not substitute for deep JVM and Spring expertise.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Some IDE-adjacent experience via NI LabWindows/CVI C/C++ work
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, OSS contributions
concerns: No demonstrated depth in Java, Kotlin, or JVM internals
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
No recent IDE-internals or language-tooling work; core stacks are Node/TS and DLang
